title: Calendar view: Day-parts instead of hours
excerpt: Hi, I would like to have “Morning”, “Afternoon” and “Evening” in the first column of the Calendar view, instead of a row for each single hour. Is this possible? Thank you!

posts.author: BVE (Bart)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I would like to have “Morning”, “Afternoon” and “Evening” in the first column of the Calendar view, instead of a row for each single hour. Is this possible? Thank you!
